member.name: T:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient
member.summary: Client for the bootloader Fastboot protocol.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.GetUInt64VarAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads a Fastboot variable as an unsigned 64-bit integer.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.GetMaxDownloadSizeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads the maximum Fastboot download size reported by the device.
member.returns: The max download size in bytes.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.GetMaxFetchSizeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads the maximum Fastboot fetch size reported by the device.
member.returns: The max fetch size in bytes.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.GetPartitionSizeAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads the partition size reported by the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.IsLogicalPartitionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads whether a partition is logical according to the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.IsUserspaceAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads whether the connected Fastboot implementation is userspace Fastboot.
member.returns: when the device reports userspace Fastboot.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.DownloadAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.Int64,System.IProgress{AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads data to the device staging buffer.
member.param: The number of bytes to send.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.FlashPartitionAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.IProgress{AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads and flashes an image to a partition.
member.param: The image length. When omitted, the stream must be seekable.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.FlashSparsePartitionAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.IProgress{AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates, downloads, and flashes an Android sparse image.
member.param: The sparse image stream. The stream must be seekable.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.BootAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Boots the previously downloaded boot image.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.FlashingUnlockCriticalAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a critical flashing unlock command.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.FlashingLockCriticalAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a critical flashing lock command.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.UploadAsync(System.IProgress{AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads data staged by the previous Fastboot command.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.UploadAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.IProgress{AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads data staged by the previous Fastboot command to a destination stream.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.FetchAsync(System.String,System.IProgress{AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches a named artifact when supported by the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.FetchAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.IProgress{AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches a named artifact to a destination stream when supported by the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.FetchPartitionAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.IProgress{AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches a partition range to a destination stream when supported by the device.
member.param: Optional number of bytes to fetch.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.CreateLogicalPartitionAsync(System.String,System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a logical partition when supported by the connected Fastboot implementation.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.DeleteLogicalPartitionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a logical partition when supported by the connected Fastboot implementation.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.ResizeLogicalPartitionAsync(System.String,System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resizes a logical partition when supported by the connected Fastboot implementation.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.UpdateSuperAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates super partition metadata using a previously downloaded image.
member.param: Whether to wipe existing logical partitions.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient.SnapshotUpdateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The snapshot operation, such as cancel or merge.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClientOptions
member.summary: Options used when connecting to a Fastboot device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClientOptions.TransportFactory
member.summary: Gets or sets the USB transport factory. When omitted, the global transport registry is used.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClientOptions.ChunkSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the transfer chunk size used for data phases.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClientOptions.InfoProgress
member.summary: Gets or sets a progress sink for bootloader informational text.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageChunk
member.summary: Describes one Android sparse image chunk.
member.param: The number of output blocks represented by the chunk.
The encoded payload length after the chunk header.
The expanded output length in bytes.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageChunk.#ctor(AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseChunkKind,System.UInt32,System.UInt64,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Describes one Android sparse image chunk.
member.param: The number of output blocks represented by the chunk.
The encoded payload length after the chunk header.
The expanded output length in bytes.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageChunk.BlockCount
member.summary: The number of output blocks represented by the chunk.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageChunk.EncodedDataLength
member.summary: The encoded payload length after the chunk header.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageChunk.OutputLength
member.summary: The expanded output length in bytes.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageInfo
member.summary: Describes a validated Android sparse image.
member.param: The expanded raw image byte length.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageInfo.#ctor(AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageHeader,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageChunk},System.UInt64,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Describes a validated Android sparse image.
member.param: The expanded raw image byte length.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageInfo.ExpandedLength
member.summary: The expanded raw image byte length.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageReader.ReadHeaderAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The stream positioned at the sparse header.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageReader.ReadChunkHeaderAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The stream positioned at a chunk header.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageReader.ReadChunkHeaderAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.UInt16,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The stream positioned at a chunk header.
The chunk header size reported by the sparse image header.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageReader.ReadInfoAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads and validates an Android sparse image from the current stream position.
